<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/companies/{company_id}/payroll_reversals"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all approved Payroll Reversals for a Company.

scope: `payrolls:read`
